positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a gentle lion's head and stylized mane, surrounded by abstract botanical elements like tropical leaves and delicate ferns. The style should be a sophisticated, modern woodcut print aesthetic with deep black ink lines contrasted against a warm cream background. Focus on clean, strong silhouettes and negative space, maintaining a central and symmetrical composition. Use flat color blocking and sharp, crisp line work suitable for apparel transfer printing. Clean edges, high contrast, vibrant yet muted color palette (teal, gold, forest green).
